script: ಒಂದೇ ತಾಯಿ-ತಂದೆಯ ಮಕ್ಕಳು ಕೂಡಾ ಪೂರ್ತಿಯಾಗಿ ಒಂದೇ ರೀತಿ ಇರುವುದಿಲ್ಲ. ಯಾಕೆ ಗೊತ್ತಾ?
script_display: ಒಂದೇ ತಾಯಿ-ತಂದೆಯ ಮಕ್ಕಳು ಕೂಡಾ ಪೂರ್ತಿಯಾಗಿ ಒಂದೇ ರೀತಿ ಇರುವುದಿಲ್ಲ. ಯಾಕೆ ಗೊತ್ತಾ?

visual.description: A visually striking collage of diverse human faces, or a split screen showing two siblings who look related but are clearly not identical. The tone should be curious and engaging.
visual.scientific_significance: This visual serves as a 'hook', posing a relatable, real-world question that the module will answer. It immediately connects the scientific concept of variation to the student's own experience.
visual.placeholder_note: Image to be generated. Focus on a relatable human element. This will be the background for the title text.
